title: rondeletia steirophylloides
intro: Rondeletia steirophylloides, also known as the tree Rondeletia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rondeletia steirophylloides include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating digestive problems and fever. Herbal preparations of Rondeletia steirophylloides can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
